title: Abyssal Enchants
description: Adds 10 new enchantments with custom visuals, sounds, and HUD stack tracking
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gLItQNw_u-A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe><iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2ypTWlcAemI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe><iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jSDfCAC5KCU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Abyssal Enchants is a combat focused enchantment pack that introduces 10 new weapon and armor enchantments, with more planned in future updates.

Several effects are inspired by mechanics from League of Legends, re-imagined for Minecraft with counterplay and PvE and PvP tuning.

Every enchant features visual and sound effects, and stack based mechanics are supported by a built-in HUD so players can track combat stacks clearly in fights.

Design:

-  Skill-driven combat
-  PvE & PvP balanced with counters
-  Custom sounds & particles
-  Readable stack tracking
-  Systems built to expand over time
Current Enchantments (v1.0)

Weapons

- Undertow — 3 stacks then pops for more damage
- Hemorrhage — 5 stacks and pops for more damage
- Cinderbrand — ignites with fire
- Soul Siphon — first hit does more damage and heals, then goes on cooldown.
- Grave Momentum — killing a mob/player grants a temporary damage bonus.
- 
Armor

- Steel Aegis — grants stacking damage reduction while in combat.
- Lifeline — saves you at low health with regen.
- Second Wind — grants absorption and brief invulnerability at low hp.
- Last Stand — when low health you get more damage and resistance.
- Absolute Focus — do more damage the longer in combat without taking damage.



Planned for future updates:

-  In-game config screens and advanced tuning options
-  Expanded visual polish for high-tier enchants
-  Seasonal or themed enchant updates
-  Neoforge and Fabric support
